caption: Clara, a charming French literature teacher, glides through the sunlit library, her curvy frame accentuated by a fitted navy blouse and pencil skirt. As she turns a page, her graceful movements catch the light, drawing students' eyes with every whisper of her silk scarf. 📚💃 #UniversityLife #SexyTeacher #LiteraryMagic #StudentLore #ElegantVibe
